{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323175632E760C70D8846C74B6DE1"}"},"total":11336},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7330968013897499454","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看这个词我已经说厌了！通宵看完的，作者文笔很好，每个小世界的剧情也很好，感情线很甜！！！真假少爷的剧情很让人心疼，真少爷太惨了呜呜呜，后劲没缓过去，但最后每个小世界原主角攻受最后的结局都很好，该幸福的幸福，该惨的惨，看得很爽！最后，很期待修仙小世界的发展，作者的文笔很好，反正我是猜不出接下来的发展了，但不得不说修仙小世界虽然只写了两章，但是开头写的就很好了~期待后面的剧情！","text_exts":[{"e":49,"s":45,"text":"真假少爷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%9C%9F%E5%81%87%E5%B0%91%E7%88%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774259792C74B6DE1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227330968013897499454%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227282405971924618251%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%9C%9F%E5%81%87%E5%B0%91%E7%88%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706999856,"group_id":"7282405971924618251","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":" •᷄ࡇ•᷅ ","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+DcRRJeZaO4aSi3ftF3IYcxbc31D/qwhWEsHjeYXrwn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c404f9618f6e4f1db5d7e54673fdcc0f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794585&x-signature=KKwEQcRyhHVeYuWZm59XBj%2FlRA8%3D","user_id":"3597227774710638","user_name":"序心愿遂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3597227774710638","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7282405971924618251","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+双男主+炮灰逆袭+主受+1v1+双洁】
主神网恋被骗了！
对方还在奔现路上跑路了！
主神怒而发出特级通缉令，势必要抓回突然就没了的老婆。
……
已经躲进小世界做任务的谢遥臣，两眼无辜。
“恋爱？没谈过。”
“网恋诈骗？不清楚。”
“特级通缉犯？也不认识耶。”
他绑着一个炮灰逆袭系统，快乐地穿梭在各个小世界，收拾傻逼的同时，还谈起了甜甜的恋爱。
男朋友又高又帅还特别爱他，如果不是身上某些地方总让他幻视主神那狗东西，那就很完美了……
狗东西： ow_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":76,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1588,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21729,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":47855},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7366869343006229310","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星给系统宝宝，宝宝泥是我见过最可爱的系统宝宝！！系统好形象，虽然大部分系统都是走跟宿主欢喜冤家的路线，但001就是格外形象，可爱宝宝咪咪咪咪给我亲一口！！
五星给我们臣臣宝宝和主神，爹的这个互宠的氛围真是太棒了，非常自然的感情线，没有强行发糖，上来就直球真是好样的[赞][赞][赞][赞]爱就要大声说出来！！都长嘴了真好（狼狼贴贴表情包）
五星给文中出现的所有可爱角色，作者描写的大部分角色都是可爱的人，臣臣遇到的大部分父母长辈朋友都是善良温暖的人，看完这篇文上班的怨气都消散了不少（安详）","text_exts":[{"e":48,"s":44,"text":"欢喜冤家","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%AC%A2%E5%96%9C%E5%86%A4%E5%AE%B6&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774259792C74B6DE1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227366869343006229310%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227282405971924618251%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%AC%A2%E5%96%9C%E5%86%A4%E5%AE%B6%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715237520,"group_id":"7282405971924618251","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好运常在","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+2seWXfZ1CRDmcKNQMcp/hmC3YyCb/+pMAdtPtMerKA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a11dab565d05464e975f46483c72a491~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787262&x-signature=dN6qK2lQHZifpfYXl%2Fq%2BT%2BzICBc%3D","user_id":"3782785403993523","user_name":"等下看啥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3782785403993523","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7282405971924618251","book_info":{"abstract":"【快穿+双男主+炮灰逆袭+主受+1v1+双洁】
